message:
fix(web): Address lint issues in Dashboards and Fleet pages

- Prefix unused hook returns with underscore in Dashboards.tsx
- Add htmlFor/id associations for form labels in Fleet.tsx
- Add keyboard handlers and ARIA roles for interactive divs

Reduces lint warnings from 54 to 45.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,10 +41,10 @@ export function DashboardsPage() {
     error,
     saving,
     listDashboards,
-    getDashboard,
+    getDashboard: _getDashboard,
     createDashboard,
-    updateDashboard,
-    deleteDashboard,
+    updateDashboard: _updateDashboard,
+    deleteDashboard: _deleteDashboard,
     duplicateDashboard,
     addWidget,
     updateWidget,
